name: Garlic Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the tomatoes and blend with 2 cloves of garlic in a blender.
2. Add 1/4 of the green pepper, 1/4 of the onion, and 1/2 of the cucumber to the blender.
3. Chill the mixture.
4. Chop the remaining vegetables and place them in separate serving dishes in the refrigerator.
5. Place the tomato juice in the refrigerator.
6. Just before serving, blend olive oil, lemon juice, salt, cayenne pepper, and tomato juice together.
7. Add this blended mixture to the blender containing the tomatoes and garlic.
8. Serve the gazpacho in soup dishes, passing chopped vegetables and a dish of croutons as garnish.
